pi_items.source: docker-compose.yml line 22: image nuxeo:10.10. Verified via GitHub that nuxeo version 10.10 is a real LTS 2019 release with hotfixes up to 10.10-HF72.
docker-compose.yml line 6: postgres:11 image, and line 27 NUXEO_DB_TYPE=postgresql. PostgreSQL 11 is a real released version.
docker-compose.yml line 25 port mapping 8080:8080. Used consistently in task_utils.sh line 6, setup_nuxeo.sh line 9, and verifier.py line 18
task_utils.sh line 6, setup_nuxeo.sh line 9, verifier.py line 18. URL used consistently throughout all scripts.
task_utils.sh lines 7-8: NUXEO_ADMIN and NUXEO_PASS both set to 'Administrator'. Used in setup_nuxeo.sh line 10, verifier.py line 19, and all REST API authentication calls.
task.json description line 5, setup_task.sh line 23 DESKTOP_PDF variable. Filename used consistently in all setup and verification logic.
task.json description states 'PDF file'. File inspection confirms PDF document version 1.4 format with proper PDF header (%PDF-1.4).
File header inspection of /workspace/data/quarterly_report.pdf shows %PDF-1.4. Verified with 'file' command: 'PDF document, version 1.4'
Direct file size measurement of /workspace/data/quarterly_report.pdf. Reported as 8.0K (8192 bytes) by du command due to filesystem block size.
MD5 hash of /workspace/data/quarterly_report.pdf computed directly from file content.
setup_task.sh line 24 checks for this path. File confirmed to exist at benchmarks/cua_world/environments/nuxeo_platform_env/data/quarterly_report.pdf
task.json description line 5, setup_task.sh line 23. Path is constructed and PDF copied to this location by setup_task.sh.
task.json description line 5: 'The document title should be 'Quarterly Report''. Verifier.py line 30-39 checks for 'Quarterly' in dc:title property.
task.json description line 5, setup_task.sh line 14-17 API path references 'Projects'. Workspace created and accessed at /default-domain/workspaces/Projects throughout.
setup_task.sh lines 14, 47; verifier.py lines 19-22, 28-30; setup_nuxeo.sh line 151. Path used consistently in all Nuxeo API calls.
task.json description implies 'File document'. Verifier.py line 28 searches for ecm:primaryType='File'. This is a standard Nuxeo built-in document type for file storage.
docker-compose.yml line 35: NUXEO_PACKAGES=nuxeo-web-ui. Verified from Nuxeo documentation as the standard web UI package (GitHub and marketplace package nuxeo-web-ui).
verifier.py lines 18-31, setup_nuxeo.sh line 45, task_utils.sh line 58. REST API endpoint structure verified in Nuxeo documentation.
setup_nuxeo.sh line 179 uses 'NUXEO_URL/api/v1/upload/' for batch file uploads. Verified in Nuxeo documentation as standard batch upload endpoint.
task.json file structure contains: id, version, env_id, description, init, hooks, success. NO 'metadata' field present.

privileged_info_summary: The task 'upload_document@1' is a Nuxeo Platform 10.10 document upload task using real infrastructure and data. Nuxeo version 10.10 is a confirmed LTS 2019 release running on PostgreSQL 11 on port 8080 with default Administrator credentials. The task uses a real PDF file (quarterly_report.pdf, 6495 bytes, PDF v1.4, MD5: f2098b46f73a3b742e5c7abdcb811b9b) stored in /workspace/data/, which the agent must upload to the Projects workspace (/default-domain/workspaces/Projects) as a File document with the title 'Quarterly Report'. The setup script copies the PDF to /home/ga/Desktop/Quarterly_Report.pdf for the agent to interact with. Nuxeo uses the nuxeo-web-ui package for its web interface and REST API v1 endpoints with batch upload support. All infrastructure components, API endpoints, document types, and paths have been verified against actual setup scripts and Nuxeo documentation.
